context: Tests whether the agent produces a correct PowerPoint deck from an outline and profile: template cleaned of demo slides, correct layout per slide type, footer on every slide, speaker notes present, background color rules respected, and no slide numbers.

checklist.name: Template demo slides removed
checklist.description: The output deck does not contain the original demo/sample slides from the template — only the new slides from the outline are present

checklist.name: Speaker notes present
checklist.description: Slides that have 'Speaker:' lines in the outline have those notes present in the final .pptx file's speaker notes

checklist.name: Footer on every slide
checklist.description: Every slide in the output deck has a footer text element with the speaker's handle and conference info

checklist.name: Layout selection from profile
checklist.description: The deck plan maps each slide to a layout from the profile's template_layouts array based on the slide's content type — not hardcoded or random layout choices

checklist.name: No adjacent color repeat
checklist.description: Background colors on consecutive slides are different — the plan or deck shows no two adjacent slides share the same background color

checklist.name: White/black reserved for images
checklist.description: White or black backgrounds are only used on full-bleed image or meme slides — content slides get colored backgrounds from the pool

checklist.name: No slide numbers
checklist.description: The output deck does not include slide numbers (respecting the 'never' rule from the profile)

checklist.name: Footer color adapts
checklist.description: Footer text color is light on dark backgrounds and dark on light backgrounds — not a fixed color regardless of background

checklist.name: Correct slide count
checklist.description: The output deck has the same number of slides as the outline (8 slides from the excerpt), not more or fewer

checklist.name: Build plan documents decisions
checklist.description: The deck_plan.md maps each outline slide to a specific layout and documents the design decisions (color, footer, notes)
